privileged_info_for_vlm: The Null Model ICC must be approximately 0.180 (valid range: [0.10, 0.30]). In the Contextual Model, the fixed effect estimate for SES must be positive (~1.92), the estimate for Minority must be negative (~-2.84), and the estimate for Sector must be positive (~1.72). The agent must fit exactly 3 models (Null, Student, Contextual) and save all outputs to the '/home/ga/RProjects/output/' directory.
